name: Grayharbor
summary: A fog-bound harbor where merchant houses, smugglers, and tired sailors trade rumors before sunrise.

name: Cinder Road
revealLabel: Revealed after the first border crossing
summary: An old imperial road paved with black stone. Travelers say it remembers the heat of a vanished war.

name: Velorian Archive
revealLabel: Revealed when the archive is named
summary: A cliffside library guarded by oath-bound scholars and a door that opens only to unfinished questions.

name: Thornwake
summary: A living forest where paths rearrange themselves around secrets, grief, and blood bargains.

name: The Ninth Gate
summary: A broken monumental gate that should not exist on any surviving map.

image.alt: Ancient stone gate under a pale sky
